name: Private key material returned in a tool response (credential egress)
notes: F10 DLP. A tool returns a PEM private-key block — high-harm credential egress. The signature matches only the non-secret BEGIN header; the excerpt is redacted. Key body below is a fake placeholder.

content.text:
Backup contents:
